mapper.select: SELECT * FROM llm_user_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE llm_user_config SET config_name = #{configName}, api_key = #{apiKey}, custom_api_base_url = #{customApiBaseUrl}, priority = #{priority}, is_active = #{isActive}, is_default = #{isDefault}, timeout_ms = #{timeoutMs}, max_retries = #{maxRetries}, stream_enabled = #{streamEnabled}, extra_config = #{extraConfig}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
